seoTitle: Mount Pelion vs Mount Perry — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Mount Pelion and Mount Perry. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Mount Pelion vs Mount Perry: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mount Pelion and Mount Perry.
heading: Mount Pelion vs Mount Perry — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mount Pelion, Queensland and Mount Perry, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mount Pelion has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Mount Perry (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mount Pelion or Mount Perry safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mount Pelion has a flood risk score of 48/100, while Mount Perry scores 54/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mount Pelion scores 48/100 for bushfire risk. Mount Perry scores 60/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mount Pelion or Mount Perry?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mount Pelion has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.15% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
